title: ArcTv mods
description: the modpack for arc tv feel free to use it how ever you please
body:
Arc tv is a mod pack doesn't add much to vanilla, but offers a unique experience with diffrent mods. 

This mod offers

- [Blahaj mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj)
- Performance improvements
- Shaders
- And so much more

Game Recommendations 
I recommend  using at minimum 2G of ram
